title: Is there any official supported package team for ubuntu 22.04?
body:
The current ubuntu 22.04 has podman 3.3.1, I guess they will stay on it.

But if people who want to keep up to date with containers/podman official release. 
it will be a problem

I wonder if there is a official supported team to package common linux distro for each new version of podman.

For reference, like nodesource, they official contribute for the nodejs distribution for each common linux distro.

https://github.com/nodesource/distributions/blob/master/README.md

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/278153/151725907-59af1e35-95c5-40b1-afe9-49b32d74ef1a.png)




If podman want to take user switch from docker. 

they should take better distro support for linux user , like what docker does.

comments.body:
The current solution, is pin on this version 3.3.1, we must using the right version to connect ubuntu server. or we will got problem.
I know the diffrent client/server podman version will cause problem. 

If we can not got the latest release, we must pin on old version.
@lsm5 PTAL. Do you plan to update the kubic repos for newer releases?
